###############################################################################
# NSX Module: resnet-aot
#
#   Generated by heliaAOT v0.17.1 on 2026-06-09
#
#   This CMakeLists.txt is designed for the neuralspotx (NSX) build system.
#   It requires:
#     - NSX_BOARD_FLAGS_TARGET  (board-specific compile flags)
#     - nsx::cmsis_nn           (CMSIS-NN kernel library)
#
#   For standalone CMake builds without NSX, use --module.type=cmake instead.
#
###############################################################################

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)
include(GNUInstallDirs)

# ── Guard: NSX board flags must be defined ────────────────────────────────
if(NOT DEFINED NSX_BOARD_FLAGS_TARGET)
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "resnet-aot: NSX_BOARD_FLAGS_TARGET is not defined.\n"
        "This module requires the NSX build system. Use --module.type=cmake for standalone builds.")
endif()

# ── Static library (shared boilerplate from macros.j2) ────────────────────
add_library(resnet_aot STATIC)

target_compile_features(resnet_aot PUBLIC c_std_99)

target_sources(resnet_aot PRIVATE
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_0.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_1.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_2.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_add_3.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_4.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_5.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_6.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_add_7.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_8.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_9.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_conv_2d_10.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_add_11.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_average_pool_2d_12.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_reshape_13.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_fully_connected_14.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_softmax_15.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_model.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_tensors.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_constants.c
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/resnet_context.c
)

target_include_directories(resnet_aot PUBLIC
  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/includes-api>
  $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/nsx/modules/resnet-aot/includes-api>
)

# ── NSX alias / export name ───────────────────────────────────────────────
set_target_properties(resnet_aot PROPERTIES EXPORT_NAME resnet_aot)
add_library(nsx::resnet_aot ALIAS resnet_aot)

# ── Dependencies ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
target_link_libraries(resnet_aot
    PUBLIC
        ${NSX_BOARD_FLAGS_TARGET}
        nsx::cmsis_nn
)

# ── Memory placement override hook ────────────────────────────────────────
# Consumers (e.g. heliaPROFILER) can set this to a header that redefines
# the RESNET_PUT_IN_* macros with real section attributes.
# The header is force-preincluded so it takes effect before platform.h's
# #ifndef guards.
if(DEFINED RESNET_AOT_ATTRIBUTES_HEADER)
    if(EXISTS "${RESNET_AOT_ATTRIBUTES_HEADER}")
        target_compile_options(resnet_aot PUBLIC
            "-include${RESNET_AOT_ATTRIBUTES_HEADER}"
        )
    else()
        message(WARNING
            "resnet-aot: attributes header not found: "
            "${RESNET_AOT_ATTRIBUTES_HEADER}")
    endif()
endif()

# ── Install ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
install(DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/includes-api
    DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/nsx/modules/resnet-aot)
install(TARGETS resnet_aot EXPORT nsxTargets)
